mapper.select: SELECT p.id FROM project_member pm JOIN project p ON p.id = pm.project_id WHERE pm.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.created_at ASC, p.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT stv.id FROM scenario_template_version stv JOIN scenario_template st ON st.id = stv.template_id WHERE st.template_key = #{templateKey} AND st.status = 'ACTIVE' AND stv.is_default = TRUE ORDER BY stv.created_at DESC, stv.id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workspace (id, name, slug, created_by) VALUES (#{workspaceId}, #{name}, #{slug}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=OTHER}) ON CONFLICT (slug) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, created_by = COALESCE(workspace.created_by, EXCLUDED.created_by), deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO workspace_member (workspace_id, user_id, role, status) VALUES (#{workspaceId}, #{userId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{role}, #{status}) ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET role = EXCLUDED.role, status = EXCLUDED.status, updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO project (id, workspace_id, name, project_key, base_url, description, status, created_by) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{workspaceId}, #{name}, #{projectKey}, #{baseUrl}, #{description}, 'ACTIVE', #{createdBy,jdbcType=OTHER}) ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, project_key) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, base_url = EXCLUDED.base_url, description = EXCLUDED.description, status = 'ACTIVE', deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO project_member (project_id, user_id, role) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{userId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{role}) ON CONFLICT (project_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET role = EXCLUDED.role, updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO scenario_template (id, template_key, name, description, category, status) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{templateKey}, #{name}, #{description}, #{category}, #{status}) ON CONFLICT (template_key) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, description = EXCLUDED.description, category = EXCLUDED.category, status = EXCLUDED.status, updated_at = NOW()
